description_long: This object is a vintage corded telephone with a classic rotary dial and ornate brass and wood construction. The base is made of polished dark wood with a beveled edge, supporting a brass rotary dial on the front and a domed brass bell cover at the center. The handset is cylindrical, featuring black and brass elements, and is connected to the base by a coiled brown cord. The handset rests on a decorative brass cradle with spherical accents, and the earpiece and mouthpiece are both circular with black and brass finishes. The rotary dial is detailed with finger holes and a central emblem, typical of early 20th-century telephones. The overall design is elegant and robust, evoking a sense of historical craftsmanship.
description: A vintage rotary dial corded telephone with a polished wood base, ornate brass details, and a coiled cord connecting the black-and-brass handset. The design is elegant and historically styled.
description_view_0: Front view showing the coiled cord extending from the handset, the rotary dial angled to the left, and the ornate brass cradle.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the rotary dial, the full handset resting on the cradle, and the detailed wood and brass construction.
description_view_2: Rear view with the rotary dial visible on the left side, showing the back of the handset and the wood base's beveled edge.
description_view_3: Direct back view displaying the symmetrical brass cradle, the handset, and the coiled cord extending to the right.
